wget https://challenge-files.picoctf.net/c_plain_mesa/acabec5cd73b3bacd25f5b64de2d2fc5444e7433c627ffde40aa3765e3e0b659/flag.enc  
wget https://challenge-files.picoctf.net/c_plain_mesa/acabec5cd73b3bacd25f5b64de2d2fc5444e7433c627ffde40aa3765e3e0b659/image.jpg  
exiftool -a -u -g1 image.jpg  
-> 觀察到commend"2d2d2d..."  
-> 丟https://gchq.github.io/CyberChef/#recipe=From_Hex('None')&  
-> -----BEGIN PRIVATE KEY----- -> 私鑰  
cat <<EOF > private.key -----BEGIN PRIVATE KEY----- .... EOF  
-> 存新檔  
openssl pkeyutl -decrypt -inkey private.key -in flag.enc -out flag.txt
